lines.gurmukhi: ਚਮਤਕਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਏਕੁ ਤਹ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: chamatakaar pragaas deh dis ek teh drisattaaeaa |
lines.english: The brilliant flash of the One Lord is revealed to them - they behold Him in the ten directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਚਰਣ ਜੰਪੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਆਪਿ ਬਨਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੩॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai charan janpai bhagat vachhal har birad aap banaaeaa |4|3|6|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I meditate on the Lord's lotus feet; the Lord is the Lover of His devotees; this is His natural way. ||4||3||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਰੁ ਸੰਤਨ ਸੋਹਾਗੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: thir santan sohaag marai na jaave |
lines.english: The Husband Lord of the Saints is eternal; He does not die or go away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਿਨਾਸੀ ਅਵਿਗਤੁ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਦਾ ਨਵਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: avinaasee avigat so prabh sadaa navatan niramalaa |
lines.english: God is eternal and immortal, forever young and immaculately pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਹੁ ਸੁ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਰਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai grihi har naahu su sad hee raave |
lines.english: She, whose home is blessed by her Husband Lord, enjoys Him forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਦੂਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਸਦ ਸਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: neh door sadaa hadoor tthaakur deh dis pooran sad sadaa |
lines.english: He is not far away, He is ever-present; the Lord and Master fills the ten directions, forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨਪਤਿ ਗਤਿ ਮਤਿ ਜਾ ਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਭਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: praanapat gat mat jaa te pria preet preetam bhaave |
lines.english: He is the Lord of souls, the source of salvation and wisdom. The Love of my Dear Beloved is pleasing to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਥਿਰੁ ਸੰਤਨ ਸੋਹਾਗੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਵਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak vakhaanai gur bachan jaanai thir santan sohaag marai na jaave |1|
lines.english: Nanak speaks what the Guru's Teachings have led him to know. The Husband Lord of the Saints is eternal; He does not die or go away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਰਾਮ ਭਤਾਰੁ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਅਨਦੁ ਘਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau raam bhataar taa kai anad ghanaa |
lines.english: One who has the Lord as her Husband enjoys great bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣੁ ਮਹਤੁ ਕਲਿਆਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੁਰਜਨੁ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ॥
lines.translit: maan mehat kaliaan har jas sang surajan so prabhoo |
lines.english: She obtains honor, greatness and happiness, singing the Praise of the Lord. God, the Great Being, is always with her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਵੰਤੀ ਸਾ ਨਾਰਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪੂਰਿ ਬਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sukhavantee saa naar sobhaa poor banaa |
lines.english: That soul-bride is happy, and her glory is perfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਧੁਰ ਬਾਨੀ ਪਿਰਹਿ ਮਾਨੀ ਥਿਰੁ ਸੋਹਾਗੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਬਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: madhur baanee pireh maanee thir sohaag taa kaa banaa |
lines.english: Her speech is so sweet; she obeys her Beloved Lord; her marriage is permanent and everlasting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸਿਧਿ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਤਿਤੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਨਹੀ ਊਨਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਛੂ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sidh nav nidh tith grihi nahee aoonaa sabh kachhoo |
lines.english: She attains total perfection and the nine treasures; her home lacks nothing. - everything is there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਰਾਮੁ ਭਤਾਰੁ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਅਨਦੁ ਘਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vakhaanai gur bachan jaanai jaa ko raam bhataar taa kai anad ghanaa |2|
lines.english: Nanak chants what he knows through the Guru's Teachings: One who has the Lord as her Husband enjoys great bliss. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਸਉ ਚਰਣ ਪਖਾਰਿ ਆਪੁ ਤਿਆਗੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: peesau charan pakhaar aap tiaageeai |
lines.english: Let us grind their corn, wash their feet and so renounce our self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਟੈ ਸੰਤਾਪੁ ਆਪੁ ਨਹ ਜਾਣਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: taj aap mittai santaap aap neh jaanaaeeai |
lines.english: Let us shed our egos, and our troubles shall be removed; let us not display ourselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਉ ਸਖੀ ਸੰਤ ਪਾਸਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਗੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aau sakhee sant paas sevaa laageeai |
lines.english: Come, O my companions, let us dedicate ourselves to serving the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਦਾਸ ਦਾਸੀ ਤਜਿ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਜਾਗੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: kar daas daasee taj udaasee kar jorr din rain jaageeai |
lines.english: Let us become the slaves of His slaves, and shed our sadness, and with our palms pressed together, remain wakeful day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਗਹੀਜੈ ਮਾਨਿ ਲੀਜੈ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: saran gaheejai maan leejai kare so sukh paaeeai |
lines.english: Let us take to His Sanctuary and obey Him, and be happy with whatever He does.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਆਉ ਸਖੀ ਸੰਤ ਪਾਸਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਗੀਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak vakhaanai gur bachan jaanai aau sakhee sant paas sevaa laageeai |3|
lines.english: Nanak chants what he knows through the Guru's Teachings; come, O my companions, let us dedicate ourselves to serving the Saints. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਿਮਰਣ ਲਾਗਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang har kai rang gobind simaran laagiaa |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, immerse yourself in the Love of the Lord; remember the Lord of the Universe in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗ ਸਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai masatak bhaag si sevaa laaeaa |
lines.english: One who has such good destiny written upon his forehead, dedicates himself to His service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸ ਜਿਨੑ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee pooran aas jina saadhasang paaeaa |
lines.english: One who attains the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, has his desires fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਸੁਭਾਉ ਵੂਠਾ ਅਨਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man saant sehaj subhaau vootthaa anad mangal gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: Peace, poise and tranquility fill his mind, and he sings the Lord's Glorious Praises with joy and delight.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਸਗਲ ਤਿਨਹਿ ਤਿਆਗਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bharam mohu vikaar doojaa sagal tineh tiaagiaa |
lines.english: Doubt, emotional attachment, sin and duality - he renounces them all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗ ਸਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੪॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak vakhaanai gur bachan jaanai jaa kai masatak bhaag si sevaa laaeaa |4|4|7|
lines.english: Nanak chants what he knows through the Guru's Teachings: one who has such good destiny written upon his forehead, dedicates himself to His service. ||4||4||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੰਤਿਆ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਕਹੈ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japantiaa kachh na kahai jamakaal |
lines.english: If you chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the Messenger of Death will have nothing to say to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਉ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਉਧਾਰਿ ਲੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: milau santan kai sang mohi udhaar lehu |
lines.english: Let me join the Society of the Saints - save me, Lord!

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੁਖੀ ਹੋਇ ਅੰਤੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਗੋਪਾਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak man tan sukhee hoe ante milai gopaal |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the mind and body will be at peace, and in the end, you shall merge with the Lord of the world. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਉ ਕਰਉ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: binau krau kar jorr har har naam dehu |
lines.english: With my palms pressed together, I offer my prayer: give me Your Name, O Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਾਗਉ ਚਰਣ ਲਾਗਉ ਮਾਨੁ ਤਿਆਗਉ ਤੁਮੑ ਦਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har naam maagau charan laagau maan tiaagau tuma deaa |
lines.english: I beg for the Lord's Name, and fall at His feet; I renounce my self-conceit, by Your kindness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਮਰਥ ਅਗਥ ਅਪਾਰ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬਿਨਉ ਏਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: samarath agath apaar niramal sunahu suaamee binau ehu |
lines.english: O all-powerful, indescribable, infinite and immaculate Lord Master, listen to this, my prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤਹੂੰ ਨ ਧਾਵਉ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਾਵਉ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਰਿ ਮਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: katahoon na dhaavau saran paavau karunaa mai prabh kar meaa |
lines.english: I shall not wander anywhere else, but take to Your Sanctuary. O God, embodiment of mercy, have mercy on me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਨੁ ਮਾਗੈ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਲੇਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar jorr naanak daan maagai janam maran nivaar lehu |1|
lines.english: With palms pressed together, Nanak begs for this blessing: O Lord, let my cycle of birth and death come to an end. ||1||
